description: This schema uses 'additionalProperties: false' to ensure strict validation by disallowing properties not explicitly defined in the schema.

correlation_id.description: Global id of the operation that originated this message. Used for tracking the operation on all the services involved
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

data_type.description: id of the json schema associated with this message
data_type.title: Data Type

interchange_id.description: Local id of the operation that originated this message. This id is local to the service/microservice that originated the message
interchange_id.title: Interchange Id

source.description: id of the service/microservice that generated this message
source.title: Source

timestamp.description: Date when this message was generated
timestamp.title: Timestamp

additionals.description: Additional services list in CTT system is equivalent to special services

organic_point_code.description: Code (ID) of the PUDO internally assigned by CTT Express. This code is a combination of the provider code and the point code. This field can be used on ERE and PER additionals
organic_point_code.title: Organic Point Code

point_code.description: Code (ID) of the PUDO location using the PUDO provider schema. This field can be used on ERE and PER additionals
point_code.title: Point Code

point_name.description: Human readable name of the PUDO location. This field can be used on ERE and PER additionals
point_name.title: Point Name

provider_code.description: Provider code associated to the PUDO service. This field can be used on ERE and PER additionals
provider_code.title: Provider Code

additionals.title: Additional Services

created_datetime.description: Datetime when the shipping was created
created_datetime.title: Creation Datetime

created_process_code.description: Code of the process that created the manifest
created_process_code.title: Created Process Code

modified_process_code.description: Code of the process associated with the last modification
modified_process_code.title: Created Process Code

modified_reason_code.description: Comma separated list of reason codes associated with the last modification done to this shipping
modified_reason_code.title: Modified Reason Code

modified_user_code.description: User code associated with the last modification
modified_user_code.title: Modified User Code

client_center_code.description: Code of the client center this manifest is associated with
client_center_code.title: Client Center Code

client_code.description: Code of the client this manifest is associated with used in CTT - Correios de Portugal systems
client_code.title: Client Code

client_code_es.description: Code of the client this manifest is associated with used in CTT Express systems
client_code_es.title: Spanish Client Code

contract_code.description: Contract code used in CTT Correios de Portugal systems
contract_code.title: Contract Code

examples.comments: A comment example about the delivery

examples: A comment example about the delivery
comments.title: Comments

destin_address.description: Shipping destination address (Address where the shipment must be delivered)
destin_address.title: Destination Address

destin_country_code.description: Destination country code (Country where the shipment must be delivered)
destin_country_code.title: Destination Country Code

destin_postal_code.description: Destination Postal Code (Postal Code where the shipment must be delivered)
destin_postal_code.title: Postal Code

destin_town_name.description: Shipping destination town name (Town where the shipment must be delivered)
destin_town_name.title: Destination Town Name

devolution_address.description: Devolution address of the devolution action

name.description: Name of the recipient of the devolution
name.title: Name

devolution_address.title: Devolution address

devolution_shipping_code.description: Shipping code of the related devolution shipping service
devolution_shipping_code.title: Devolution Shipping Code

dispatch_number.description: Dispash Number used by CTT - Correios de Portugal
dispatch_number.title: Dispash Number

expedition_code.description: Expedition code used by CTT - Correios de Portugal
expedition_code.title: Expedition code

is_devolution.description: Indicates that the shipping is a devolution
is_devolution.title: Is Devolution

is_expedition_prime.description: Indicates that the is a shipment (remessa)
is_expedition_prime.title: Is Shipment

is_return.description: Indicates that the shipping is a return (back)
is_return.title: Is Return

item_code.description: Code associated with this item on CTT Correios de Portugal
item_code.title: Item Other Code

item_code_es.description: Use this value if the shipping code to be used is generated by the client, a range of items agreed with CTT Express and a specific logic for generation must be taken into account
item_code_es.title: Item Code

examples: This is an example comment about the item
item_comments.title: Comments

item_provider_code.description: Item code from the external provider
item_provider_code.title: Item provider Code

item_synonym_code.description: If the label has a barcode other than the one used in CTT Express and an agreement has been reached, this number must be indicated so that it can be read by the Sorters.
item_synonym_code.title: Item Synonym Code

items_count.description: Total number of items for this shipping
items_count.title: Items Count

manifest_datetime.description: Datetime when the manifest were created
manifest_datetime.title: Manifest Datetime

origin_address.description: Origin Address (Address where you have to go to pick up the shipment)
origin_address.title: Origin Address

origin_country_code.description: Origin country code (Country where you have to go to pick up the shipment) ISO-ALFA2
origin_country_code.title: Origin Country Code

origin_postal_code.description: Origin Postal Code (Postal Code where you have to go to pick up the shipment)
origin_postal_code.title: Origin Postal Code

origin_town_name.description: The name of the origin town (Town where you have to go to pick up the shipment)
origin_town_name.title: Origin town name

provider_shipping_code.description: Shipping code assigned by the external provider
provider_shipping_code.title: External provider shipping code

recipient_country_code.description: Recipient Country Code. ISO 3166 ALPHA-2 format
recipient_country_code.title: Recipient Country Code

sender_country_code.description: Sender country code. Default: Spain (ES). ISO 3166 ALPHA-2 format
sender_country_code.title: Sender Country Code

shipping_code.description: Shipping code for this manifest used by CTT - Correios de Portugal
shipping_code.title: Shipping Code

shipping_code_es.title: Spanish Code associated with this shipping used by CTT Express

shipping_date.description: This field was previously known as `client_date`.
shipping_date.title: Shipping Date

shipping_type_code.description: Shipping type code in CTT Correios de Portugal systems
shipping_type_code.title: Shipping Type Code

shipping_type_code_es.description: Shipping type code used in CTT Express systems
shipping_type_code_es.title: Shipping Type Code

shipping_weight_declared_gr.description: Approximate total weight of the shipment (in gr)
shipping_weight_declared_gr.title: Shipping Weight Declared

transport_fiscal_code.description: Used only in PT. When the customer notifies with this code, the Portuguese system prints documentation for presentation in case of police
transport_fiscal_code.title: Transport fiscal code
